publishedAbstract: - After RHACS cluster is upgraded to version 4.4, Collector pods are getting stuck into CrashLoopBackOff state with below error message for collector container: ~~~ Trying to open the right engine! libpman: failed to create the ringbuf map for CPU '121'. (If you get memory allocation errors try to reduce the buffer dimension) (errno: 12 | message: Cannot allocate memory) terminate called after throwing an instance of 'sinsp_exception' ~~~
publishedTitle: ACS Collector pods stuck into CrashLoopBackOff state after upgrade to RHACS v4.4
